seoTitle: Southampton vs Speers Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Southampton and Speers Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Southampton vs Speers Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Southampton and Speers Point.
heading: Southampton vs Speers Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Southampton, New South Wales and Speers Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Southampton has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Speers Point (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Southampton or Speers Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Southampton has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Speers Point scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Southampton scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Speers Point scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Southampton or Speers Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Southampton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
